feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Extract the Report from SAP into Excel file
entry.content:
Hello All,

I require to interact with SAP and download the report from SAP. I am currently automating the SAP GUI to generate report from SAP by using Excel VBA Script. But, It took lot of time to complete the report extraction. 

Is there any way to get the reports from SAP without disturbing the foreground on the system ?

entry.title: Mapping issues - Actions Builder - SAP Build Automation
entry.content:
Hello ,

I'm having a flow in SAP Build Automation where I need to extract information of a pdf file by using SAP Document Information Extraction service. In SAP Build Automation I'm using the SAP GET API call for this (SAP Business Accelerator Hub). Afterwards, I need to transfer the output to SAP CPI. I'm using a post API for this where I just need to push the output as a raw body input.

I made those 2 API's in SAP Build Action Builder and defined the output schema for the GET API by using the 'generate output' option in Action Builder. For the POST API call, I used the output of the GET API to add the input schema (Fields from sample JSON).

I wanted to test this it in Action Builder and I came to the conclusion that I'm receiving this problem?

When I check my input schema I see this: 

My question now: How is it possible if I just use the output of my GET API as input in the POST API, that I says that there are mapping problems? 

Kind regards,

Cédric

entry.title: Update processing status field of standard CDS I_purchaseorderapi01 using API or EML
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am working on workflow development in BTP-SBPA. There is a requirement to update the status of PO (PurchaseProcessingStatus) in CDS I_purchaseOrderApi01 based on workflow result. I have tried using standard API for purchase order but status field is Read-only. Is there any another way to update the status ?

Backend system is S4HANA Public cloud. 

Thanks in advance!

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: SAP BTP Process Automation Data storege
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I'm working on creating a from in SAP BTP Process Automation.

My understanding is that when capturing data from a form, it is stored as part of the process instance's context, and it is available to all subsequent steps within the same workflow. The context data persists for the lifetime of the process instance. Once the process is completed, the data will be completely gone and not accessible anymore, correct? 

If that is not true or correct, how can I fetch or trace them?

entry.title: SAP Build App Integration Issue with BTP Destination
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue while integrating an SAP BTP destination with an SAP Build App. I have created a destination on SAP BTP and attempted to integrate it into my SAP Build App to fetch data entities. However, I encountered a "Connection Failed" error during the integration process.

Interestingly, when I review the data using SAP Build Code, I can see the entity details without any issues.

I suspect that the root cause of this issue is related to Additional Properties in the SAP BTP destination configuration, but I am not sure which properties need to be added or modified to resolve this issue.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? How can I resolve this connection failure in SAP Build App while the data is accessible in SAP Build Code?

entry.title: Build Process Automation Subscription Failure in SAP BTP Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi SAP team,

I’ve been trying to create the Build Process Automation subscription for the past few days, but unfortunately, it has failed. I’ve encountered an issue while processing the subscription. Please find the details attached for your review.

  • Account type: trial
  • Region : AP21 


Regards,
Yew

entry.title: Open a Webpage Detail with different url
entry.content:
Hi experts

I'm using Web Automation for the first time. At least on the SAP side. I am quite fond of Webautomation but worked mainly with C# and Selenium. 

My company asked to fetch data from a website. There i have to navigate to a page with a paginated list of Webelements and for each i need to open the corresponding Detailspage. The Detailspage always has the url in this format "root-url\details\xxx", where "xxx" is a given id associated with the webelement. From there i have to fetch some infos for further usage. Nothing really complicated. 

Now, I am quite lazy and don't want to handle pagination and I always try to reduce the automaton steps, since each extra step increases the risk of errors. So, my idea is to fetch the id's that i need and directly navigate to the page i need by just adding the id to my url.   This website allows users to download a report with the id's that i need as csv. So i'll use that as my starting point. Now, i need to directly navigate to the details pages.

With Selenium it is quite straightforward, though in SAP RPA i'm quite confused how to do it. I've already recorded the pages i need and would just need to tell the RPA to navigate to the url i need. 

Can someone help me out? Are there other resources i can read?

 

Ty in advance

entry.title: Digital Signature Verification
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Build Process Automation or Document Information Extraction, Do we have a tool to verify digital signatures?

If not does anybody know on an external service that I can use for this purpose from SAP Build Process Automation?

Thanks

SAP Build Process Automation Document Information Extraction

entry.title: How to create a simple SAP GUI using SAP Process Automation.
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am creating my first bot with Sales Order Creation, Unable to create my first automation.

 

regards

Madevan

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: selecting Multiple elements in "Set looping list" in bpa
entry.content:
In the set looping list, we can choose either of these elements:

But do we have any alternative to select all the three collections of elements under the mobiles screen so that only one For each loop can be used to get the data of all the three elements in this screen

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: Access event log, case attributes via API to perform ML based predictions
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am looking for options to access Business objects, event log created within Process Intelligence. I would require to access this data to perform ML based predictions or employ other AI based applications.  

The idea is to perform all these computations in external notebook and push this data back to Process Intelligence so that we can show predictions or any other applications.

Has anyone worked on this kind of setup, how to access data from Process Intelligence and push it back to the model. Any kind of API provided or Python based setup available, please advise.

@Process Intelligence @SAP Signavio

entry.title: SAP screens not detected as SAP GUI while capturing an Application
entry.content:
Hello Bot Devs,
In my SAP IRPA Cloud studio project, I am facing a problem with SAP GUI screen capturing, where both client and server side scripting is enabled. still while capturing a SAP screen, the tool only identifies it through UI automation and not SAP GUI technology.
My colleague who is using the same settings, system as well as the same project is able to do the same and capture the screens with SAP GUI technology without any problem.

Colleague screen

my screen


We are using the same version, build and patch level of SAP Logon application.

At this point I am not really sure what I am missing here.

SAP Desktop Agent Version 3.38.59


@peterengel @SAPSupport 
It would be great if you could help us here to identify the problem.

entry.title: Desktop Agent External Authentication: Failed to launch browser process.
entry.content:
I have setup Desktop Agent (v3) and registered and external authentication (for Office365) fine.

However, I can't reliably set this up for others. For one colleage it works, but for two others they get the following message when registering the external authentication.

An error occured during the external authentication registration. Failed to launch the browser process.

TROUBLESHOOTING: https://pptr.dev/troubleshooting.

All users defaulted to the Edge browser.

Any suggestions?

entry.title: Deployment Error In SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I've been working in SAP Build Process Automation for past few Days. 
Since yesterday i'm facing deployment issue while deploying a new version of my project.
I have also tried using different BTP Accounts or deploying other project -> same error  

Correlation ID: 3c303c32-58f6-4d7f-88ec-480870487119

Korrelations-ID: 2e052942-8a3f-43f4-4a4a-d38d0d04a2b2

 


Does anyone have any suggestions as to what else I could try?

@Sankara1 , @JesseSukhbayar , @Archana , @Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: SAP Process Automation tasks not visible in the Build Work Zone Inbox for process participant users
entry.content:
Hi all,

We have a process that is triggered with a 5 minute timer (which I trigger it by clicking the run now) from Trigger Tab in the Environment from Control Tower in Build Lobby.  Process run and executes the approval form.  I give a list of email ID (for which we have created the users in BTP and the Custom IDP as well) and I see the tasks as a developer in my inbox but for others (who are given the process participant role), the same tasks are not visible.  I gave the email list as comma seperated in the receipient list in the approval form and still they are not able to access the task.  I created the user group and added all the user's in the custom IDP that I have using the administrator access and used that group in the group section for the approval form and still the inbox is not showing the tasks.  I am the sub account administrator and other who want to the see the tasks are process participants.  I am not sure what is missing that make the inbox not to show the tasks for others even though they are added to the group in the custom IDP.

entry.title: Different results between iRPA and Build Process Automation after API call
entry.content:
Hi,

I have built an automation consisting of making an API call to retrieve all the records of road traffic offences that happened in a given fleet of vehicles.

I first built it in iRPA and when I test, the request goes fine: I get 315 pages of 20 records each, and 1 page of 14 records (total of 6314 records). This is consistent with tests made in Postman which also return 315 pages of 20 records, and 1 page of 14 records.

I then exported the same project to SAP Build Process Automation (installed in another subaccount) and tested the automation: the request works well, the test session ends without error, except it only returns 2000 records (100 pages - or 100 iterations).

Do you have any idea what would cause this? Is there some kind of limitations when testing in SAP Build Process?

Let me know if you need me to go into further detail.

Thanks beforehand for your help.

Kindest regards,

LM.

entry.title: Unable to download Desktop Agent for SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am currently working on a DOX (Document information extraction) Bot project in SAP Build Process Automation; and I am following the tutorial (sap-tutorials/sap-build-process-automation) about "Install and Set Up Desktop Agent 3" from @pbujnicka. I followed the documentation to create the user in RBSC portal, having an S-number user in SAP BTP trial cockpit, and set up the Secret ID.

But when I go to the Control Tower, and then to the Download Page, the box with the droplist to download the Agent installation file does not appear (image attached). Note: The role ProcessAutomationAdmin is already assigned to the user, and the technical user is created, and Secret ID generated and in Status: "Valid".

There is no error message and nothing to know what is going wrong.

@peterengel @SAPSupport @pbujnicka 

Please let me know, if I am missing out on anything or what is the cause of this problem and of course how can I fix it.

Thank you in advance,

Best Regards,

Rosa.

entry.title: No item displayed in My Inbox in Workzone
entry.content:
Symptom

I have enabled My Inbox in SAP BTP Work Zone. However, when workflows are triggered, no items appear in the My Inbox. 


Environment

  • SAP BTP Work Zone

  • My Inbox Application

  • SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced edition

                                                                     Added the Recipient 

                                                                             Trigger Details


                                                             Assigned Processor

                         

                                                           No Visible Items in the Inbox



I am facing an issue in above and have attached a screenshot for reference. If anyone has encountered a similar issue and found a solution, I would glad if any assistance you do. Thank you in advance for your support!



SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment 
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition , SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - How to get currectUser for Approved By
entry.content:
I want to capture currentUser so that I can pass the value in Approved By. 

Currently I use "Process Started By" but the value return is system generated and it looked like a secret code instead of currentUser name. 

How can I get currentUser name to pass actual user name in Approved By field?


Thanks!
